intent: Follow up after a sales meeting
facts: Met on Tuesday to discuss the Q3 partnership proposal
Client requested a revised pricing sheet
Next call scheduled for Friday at 2 PM
reference_email:
Subject: Following Up on Our Q3 Partnership Discussion

Dear {RECEIVER_NAME},

Thank you for taking the time to meet on Tuesday to discuss the Q3 partnership proposal. As requested, I will prepare a revised pricing sheet and send it over ahead of our next conversation.

I have scheduled our follow-up call for Friday at 2 PM to review the updated terms together. Please let me know if this time still works on your end.

I look forward to continuing the discussion.

Best regards,
{SENDER_NAME}

intent: Request for proposal details from a vendor
facts: Need detailed cost breakdown for the cloud migration project
Deadline for proposal submission is July 10
Looking for SLA terms and support response times
reference_email:
Subject: Request for Detailed Proposal – Cloud Migration Project

Dear {RECEIVER_NAME},

We are preparing to evaluate vendors for our upcoming cloud migration project and would appreciate a detailed proposal from your team.

Specifically, we would like a full cost breakdown for the engagement, along with your standard SLA terms and expected support response times. Please submit your proposal no later than July 10 so that we can complete our review on schedule.

Thank you for your attention to this request, and please reach out if you need any additional information from us.

Sincerely,
{SENDER_NAME}

intent: Quick team update on project status
facts: Backend API is 90% complete
Frontend team blocked on design assets
Demo planned for next Monday
reference_email:
Subject: Quick Project Update

Hey team,

Quick update — the backend API is about 90% done, so we're in good shape there. The frontend side is currently blocked waiting on design assets, so let's sync on that soon.

We're aiming to have a demo ready for next Monday, so let's push to clear that blocker before then.

Let me know if you hit any snags!

Thanks,
{SENDER_NAME}

intent: Urgent notice about a slipping deadline
facts: Final report due tomorrow at 5 PM
Two sections still missing data
Need sign-off from finance before submission
reference_email:
Subject: URGENT: Final Report Due Tomorrow at 5 PM

Hi {RECEIVER_NAME},

I wanted to flag that the final report is due tomorrow at 5 PM, and we still have two sections missing data. We also need finance sign-off before it can be submitted.

Could you help get the outstanding data filled in today, and can we get finance's review started as soon as possible? Time is tight, so any help moving this along would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks so much,
{SENDER_NAME}

facts: Budget for new partnerships is frozen until next fiscal year
Appreciate the detailed proposal they sent
Open to revisiting the conversation in Q1
reference_email:
Subject: Regarding Your Partnership Proposal

Dear {RECEIVER_NAME},

Thank you for the thoughtful and detailed proposal you put together — it's clear a great deal of care went into it, and I genuinely enjoyed reviewing it.

Unfortunately, our budget for new partnerships is frozen until the next fiscal year, so we are not able to move forward at this time. That said, I would very much like to revisit this conversation in Q1, when our plans for the year are clearer.

Thank you again for thinking of us, and I hope we can pick this back up soon.

Warm regards,
{SENDER_NAME}

facts: Want to catch up about the new role

Subject: Coffee this week?

Hey {RECEIVER_NAME},

It's been a while — would love to catch up and hear how the new role is going! I'm free Wednesday or Thursday afternoon if either works for you.

Want to grab coffee at the café near the office?

Let me know what works!

{SENDER_NAME}

intent: Send a comprehensive project proposal with many details
facts: Project timeline is 12 weeks
Total budget estimate is $45,000
Team will include 2 developers and 1 designer
Weekly progress reports will be provided
Kickoff meeting proposed for next Monday
reference_email:
Subject: Project Proposal – Timeline, Budget, and Team Structure

Dear {RECEIVER_NAME},

Please find below an overview of the proposed project.

We anticipate a 12-week timeline, with a total budget estimate of $45,000. The team will consist of two developers and one designer, and we will provide weekly progress reports throughout the engagement to keep you informed.

We would like to propose a kickoff meeting for next Monday to align on goals and next steps. Please let us know if this timing works for you.

We look forward to your feedback.

Best regards,
{SENDER_NAME}

intent: Escalate a delayed shipment issue to a client
facts: Shipment was due last Friday and has not arrived
Carrier confirms it is delayed by 3 days
A discount on the next order is being offered as compensation
reference_email:
Subject: Update on Your Delayed Shipment

Dear {RECEIVER_NAME},

I want to give you a prompt update regarding your shipment, which was originally due last Friday and has not yet arrived. We've confirmed with the carrier that it is delayed by three days.

We understand this is frustrating, and as a gesture of goodwill, we'd like to offer a discount on your next order. We're closely monitoring the shipment and will update you as soon as it's on its way.

Please let us know if there's anything else we can do in the meantime.

Sincerely,
{SENDER_NAME}
